scene_description: A man argues with customer service over a missing prize, followed by a woman furiously confronting her partner about a massive financial loss he caused.
transcript: Pronto? Signor Manfredi, mi perdoni, ma non posso perdere tempo al telefono con lei. Allora, io l'anno scorso con la vostra azienda ho vinto un concorso di valigie e ancora mi devono arrivare. Ah, no, non mi dica bugie. Il set di valigie risulta consegnato. Ecco, allora lo ammette che era un set. A me di queste sette me ne sono arrivate solo tre, ma mancano quattro valigie! 2.245.000 euro di perdita! E perché deve giocare a fare il costruttore? Con i soldi miei, con i capitali di mio padre! Amore, scusami, ma tu stai ingenuamente sottovalutando il rischio che un imprenditore come me non può non considerare. Un imprenditore come te? Ma tu sei uno stronzo! E ringrazia Dio che abbiamo un figlio insieme, sennò ti rimandavo in mezzo alla strada con le pezze al culo dove ti ho trovato. Ma non dire queste cattiverie, lo sai, perché poi ti senti in colpa e te ne penti. L'unica cosa di cui mi sono pentita è di avere sposato un inetto come te.

speakers.name: Speaker1
speakers.voice_reasoning: This speaker has a clear, mid-range voice strained with annoyance as he explains his problem. Sadachbia's lively and animated quality can effectively capture this agitated energy.
speakers.style_direction: An exasperated customer on the phone trying to resolve an issue. He's annoyed and becoming increasingly frustrated with the lack of help.

speakers.name: Speaker2
speakers.voice_reasoning: This speaker's tone is professional but curt and dismissive. Kore's firm and confident quality is perfect for portraying a no-nonsense customer service agent who is not interested in the customer's complaint.
speakers.style_direction: A customer service representative who is trying to get off the phone quickly. Her tone is professionally cold and she quickly becomes accusatory.

speakers.name: Speaker3
speakers.voice_reasoning: This speaker is shouting with raw fury and contempt. Pulcherrima's forward, bold, and attention-grabbing delivery is ideal for capturing this high-intensity, emotional outburst.
speakers.style_direction: A woman who has just discovered a massive financial betrayal by her partner. She is furious, shouting, and holding nothing back in her contempt and anger.

speakers.name: Speaker4
speakers.voice_reasoning: This speaker maintains a calm, measured, and patronizing tone in the face of extreme anger. Schedar's even-toned and neutral voice fits this character's attempt to sound like the reasonable one in the argument.
speakers.style_direction: A man defending a catastrophic business decision to his furious wife. He adopts a calm, almost patronizing tone, attempting to frame his failure as a calculated, intellectual risk.

segments.text: 2.245.000 euro di perdita! E perché deve giocare a fare il costruttore? Con i soldi miei, con i capitali di mio padre!
segments.tagged_text: [shouting] [angrily] Sava do million euro ka loss! [accusingly] Builder banne ka shauk hai? [shouting] Mere baap ke paison se?!
